name: Checklist Card
description: Item list in a Card with optional checkboxes for completion tracking. Used for ingredient lists, task lists, and checklists.

default.description: Vertical list of items with Checkbox for completion tracking inside a Card.

slots.header: Card.Header with title and optional count/adjuster
slots.list: Vertical list of items with Checkbox for completion tracking

slots.header: Card.Header with title and optional count
slots.list: Vertical list of items with Checkbox

command-center.notes: Card uses cc-frame-sm. Quantities use cc-data. Checked items dimmed.

auradecantism.notes: Card on glass background. Section title uses d-gradient-text.

clean.notes: Simple bordered card. Clean checkbox list.
